---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem it solves

What problem, limitation, or workflow issue does this address?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how you would like it to work.

## Example workflow

Give a short practical example of how this feature would be used.

## Area of the project

Which part does this mainly affect?

- scanning
- profiles
- baselines
- manifests
- watch mode
- reports
- duplicate review
- UI/settings
- documentation

## Additional notes

Anything else that would help explain the request.
